name: Rice and Chicken[or Turkey]
recipeIngredient: 1 small leek or onion, chopped (mostly white part)
5 ounces cooked chicken or turkey, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Put rice and liquid in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil.
2. Add curry powder, red pepper flakes, carrots, celery, leek, kale, and mushrooms. Return to a boil.
3. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 35-40 minutes, or until most of the liquid is absorbed.
4. Add meat and peas; cook another 5 minutes.
5. Serve. This serves 2 very hungry adults. You could probably stretch it to 3 by adding a bit more rice and liquid.
